title: Duzzit Floor Wipes, Pack 20 100 Percent Biodegradable Wipes
features: Duzzit Floor Wipes, Pack 20 100 PercentBiodegradable Wipes
POWER CLEANING: Duzzit Floor Wipes, perfect for use on laminate and wood floors. Quick, hygienic power cleaning wipe for kitchen and bathroom floors

EXTRA LARGE WIPE: Duzzit Floor Wipes, are extra large, extra strong, tough enough to eliminate dirt and grime. Quick cleaning without water, simply attach a wipe to a mop and clean, the floor will dry quickly.

100 PercentBIODEGRADABLE WIPES: Duzzit Floor Wipes are made from plant fibres making them 100 Percentbiodegradable. Each pack features a sealing tab, after removing a wipe, reseal the pack to prevent the wipes from drying out. Store in a cool dry place
ALL FLOOR SURFACES: Duzzit Floor Wipes are suitable for use on virtually all floor surfaces, including wood and laminate flooring, ceramic and linoleum surfaces. Clean and freshen with ease
description: Product Description Duzzit Floor Wipes, perfect for use on laminate and wood floors. Quick, hygienic power cleaning wipe for kitchen and bathroom floors. Duzzit Floor Wipes, are extra large, extra strong, tough enough to eliminate dirt and grime. Quick cleaning without water, simply attach a wipe to a mop and clean, the floor will dry quickly. Duzzit Floor Wipes are made from plant fibres making them 100 Percentbiodegradable. Each pack features a sealing tab, after removing a wipe, reseal the pack to prevent the wipes from drying out. Store in a cool dry place. Visit the search Amazon.co.uk for a range of Duzzit products or visit the Amazon Duzzit Store.
